frameworks.name: Boredom Feedback Model
frameworks.one_line: Boredom as feedback loop centered on attention shifts from inadequate engagement.

frameworks.name: attentional engagement discrepancy
frameworks.one_line: Gap between desired and actual attentional engagement drives the loop.

frameworks.name: cognitive appraisal
frameworks.one_line: Internal influences shaping inadequate attentional engagement.

core_question: What dynamic process links antecedents, experiences, and consequences of boredom?
key_assumptions: Boredom is an emotion with identifiable antecedents and consequences
Attentional engagement has both desired and actual levels
External resources and internal appraisals jointly shape engagement
key_findings: Inadequate attentional engagement instigates attention shifts characteristic of boredom
Discrepancy arises from objective resources and cognitive appraisals
interpretations: A feedback-loop framing integrates attention and meaning accounts of boredom
The model explains coping, self-control links, mixed arousal valence, and chronic boredom
